scripts.setup:run: cd data-provisioning-tool && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && cd ../db-testing-framework && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && npx playwright install && cd ..
scripts.test:full: cd data-provisioning-tool && node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' src/init-db.ts && node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' src/seeder.ts && cd ../db-testing-framework && npx playwright test
